name: Potential Phishing Attack Detected
description: A phishing attack containing a malicious file attachment has been detected.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the email event.

parameters.name: sender_address
parameters.description: The email address of the sender.

parameters.name: recipient_address
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient.

parameters.name: email_subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the email.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the detected malicious file attachment.

parameters.name: attachment_hash
parameters.description: The hash of the detected malicious file attachment.

parameters.name: threat_name
parameters.description: The specific threat name or category identified by the email security solution.

parameters.name: detection_result
parameters.description: The result of the email security detection (e.g., 'malicious', 'blocked').
